s2.ptxt: Using SST, secure the power steering link assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE STEERING LEFT TURN PRESSURE TUBE

s2.ptxt: Using SST, remove the steering left turn pressure tube.
Remove the 2 O-rings from the steering left turn pressure tube.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE STEERING RIGHT TURN PRESSURE TUBE

s2.ptxt: Using SST, remove the steering right turn pressure tube.
Remove the 2 O-rings from the steering right turn pressure tube.
Put matchmarks on the tie rod assembly LH and the steering rack end sub-assembly.
Loosen the lock nut, and remove the tie rod assembly LH and the lock nut.

atten4.ptxt: Perform the same procedure as for the LH side.

s2.ptxt: Using pliers, remove the 2 steering rack boot clips.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 STEERING RACK BOOT CLAMP

s2.ptxt: Using pliers, remove the 2 No. 2 steering rack boot clamps as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the No. 2 steering rack boot.

s2.ptxt: Remove the No. 2 steering rack boot.
Remove the No. 1 steering rack boot.
Using a screwdriver and a hammer, unstake the RH and LH claw washers.

atten3.ptxt: Avoid any impact to the steering rack.

s2.ptxt: Using SST, remove the steering rack end sub-assembly (RH side) and the claw washer.

atten3.ptxt: Use SST 09922-10010 as shown in the illustration.

s2.ptxt: Using SST, remove the steering rack end sub-assembly (LH side) and the claw washer.

atten3.ptxt: Use SST 09922-10010 as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Using SST, hold the rack and remove the steering rack end sub-assembly.

s2.ptxt: Using a straight hexagon wrench (24 mm (0.94 in.)), remove the rack guide spring cap.
Remove the compression spring and the rack guide sub-assembly.
Remove the rack guide base from the rack guide.
Remove the O-ring from the rack guide spring cap.
Wrap protective tape around the spline of the control valve in order to prevent damaging the dust cover.
Remove the dust cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE POWER STEERING CONTROL VALVE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Using a socket wrench (27 mm (1.06 in.)), remove the rack housing cap.
Using SST, hold the control valve shaft and remove the nut.
Remove the 2 bolts and the power steering control valve assembly.
Remove the gasket.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE POWER STEERING CONTROL VALVE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Using a press, remove the power steering control valve sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE POWER STEERING CONTROL VALVE LOWER OIL SEAL

s2.ptxt: Remove the power steering control valve lower oil seal from the power steering control valve sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE POWER STEERING CONTROL VALVE SPACER

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the 4 power steering control valve spacers from the power steering control valve sub-assembly.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the spacer grooves on the control valve.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE POWER STEERING CONTROL VALVE UPPER OIL SEAL

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a press, press out the power steering control valve upper oil seal and the power steering control valve upper bearing from the control valve housing sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CYLINDER END STOPPER HOLE SNAP RING

s2.ptxt: Using needle-nose pliers, remove the cylinder end stopper hole snap ring from the power steering rack housing.
Remove the power steering rack sub-assembly with the cylinder end stopper and power steering rack bushing.
Remove the cylinder end stopper from the power steering rack sub-assembly.
Remove the power steering rack bushing from the power steering rack sub-assembly.
Using a screwdriver, remove the O-ring from the power steering rack bushing.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Using SST, remove the rack bushing oil seal from the power steering rack bushing.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to drop the power steering rack bushing.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE POWER STEERING CYLINDER TUBE OIL SEAL

s2.ptxt: Using SST and a press, remove the power steering cylinder tube oil seal.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the inside surface of the power steering rack housing.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the power piston oil seal and the O-ring from the power steering rack.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the power piston oil seal groove on the power steering rack.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.
